title: Maternal exposure to cyclophosphamide during prepubertal life does not affect the cryosusceptibility of in vitro derived mouse embryos.
ehr_evidence: The study uses a mouse model, not human electronic health records.
summary: A mouse model study evaluating whether prepubertal exposure to the chemotherapy drug cyclophosphamide (CY) affects the cryosusceptibility and developmental quality of embryos derived via in vitro fertilization (IVF).
key_findings: No significant differences were found between CY-exposed and control groups in terms of post-warming survival or pluripotency marker expression.
